stem:
(12/n) − (2/t) = −(2/w)

The given equation relates the variables n, t, and w, where n > 0, t > 0, and w > t. Which expression is equivalent to n ?
explanation: Adding 2/t to both sides gives 12/n = 2/t − 2/w = (2w − 2t)/(tw) = 2(w − t)/(tw). Dividing by 2 gives 6/n = (w − t)/(tw). Taking reciprocals (all quantities positive) gives n/6 = tw/(w − t), so n = 6tw/(w − t).
